summary: The user is planning a dinner party for next month and seeks recipes for Indian-inspired appetizers and desserts, expressing interest in samosas and naan bites. They also inquire about the differences between garam masala and curry powder, the shelf life of spice blends, and request recommendations for main courses to complement their meal.
facts: The user is planning a dinner party for next month.
The user has been taking cooking classes for three weeks.
The user is experimenting with different spice blends.
The user is interested in Indian-inspired appetizers, particularly samosas and naan bites.
The user is looking for dessert recommendations that incorporate cardamom or saffron.
The user has garam masala and curry powder in their pantry and is unsure if they are still good to use.
The user decided to replace their garam masala and curry powder with fresh batches for better flavor.
The user is considering serving Chicken Tikka Masala, Palak Paneer, Butter Chicken, Sag Aloo, Lamb Korma, Vegetable Biryani, and Chana Masala as main courses for their dinner party.
